clause_text: Liquidated damages of USD 80,000 per calendar day of delay beyond the Hard Delivery Date, capped at USD 2,800,000. No force-majeure relief for single-machine failure.
All personnel assigned to P-2847 production must hold a current Government of Canada Reliability status clearance.
USD 25,000 per day of delay on Qualification Testing milestone, capped at USD 500,000.
USD 25,000 per day of delay on Customer Acceptance milestone, capped at USD 500,000.
